title: Heavy Duty PVC Coated Washing Line 20m – Durable Steel Core Clothesline, Weather Resistant, Assorted Colours (Grey, Green, Blue) (Blue)
features: Extra-Long 20 Metres – Provides ample space for drying clothes outdoors.
Durable Construction – Strong steel core wrapped in weather-resistant PVC coating for lasting use.
Weather Resistant – Designed to withstand rain, sun, and wind without damage.
Assorted Colours – Comes in grey, green, and blue for versatile outdoor use.
0.2cm Diameter – Thick and sturdy line suitable for heavy laundry loads.
description: This 20-metre heavy duty washing line is perfect for drying clothes outdoors with plenty of space. Built with a strong steel core and coated in weather-resistant PVC, it stands up to all weather conditions, ensuring durability and long-lasting performance. The line measures 0.2cm in diameter, making it sturdy enough for heavy laundry loads. Supplied in a carton with three popular colours—grey, green, and blue—this washing line adds versatility and style to any outdoor drying area. Easy to install and maintain, it’s an essential accessory for efficient clothes drying in gardens or balconies.
